steps.title: Identify Amur grape data
steps.content: The dark gray bars represent Amur grape. The opposite-side column indicates approximately 140 pairs, and the same-side column indicates approximately 60 pairs. This directly confirms the passage's claim that opposite-side is much more common.

steps.title: Match to the correct choice
steps.content:
Choice A states approximately 140 pairs show opposite-side orientation and 60 pairs show same-side orientation—the exact values from the graph. Choices B, C, and D all misrepresent the same-side count (45 or 0 instead of 60), contradicting the actual data.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
